---
title: "Project 3"
author: "Lu Bai"
date: "2026-04-18"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# Load libraries
library(survival)
library(tidyverse)
library(tableone)
library(flextable)
library(survminer) # For KM curve
library(MASS) # For stepAIC (Backward Selection)
```

# Data cleaning and management
```{r}
# Load data
framingham <- read.csv("~/Downloads/frmgham2.csv")

# Data cleaning and management
framingham1 <- framingham %>% filter(PERIOD == 1,
                                     PREVSTRK == 0)

fram_10yr <- framingham1 %>%
  mutate(
    # Time to event is the minimum of stroke date, death date, or 10 years
    # Note: If stroke occurs before death, it is an event.
    fotime = pmin(TIMESTRK, TIMEDTH, 3652, na.rm = TRUE),
    strk_event = if_else(TIMESTRK <= 3652 & STROKE == 1, 1, 0),
    dth_event = if_else(TIMEDTH <= 3652 & STROKE == 0 & DEATH == 1, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(SEX, AGE, DIABETES, SYSBP)
#, PREVCHD, BPMEDS, CURSMOKE, TOTCHOL, BMI
```

# Generate table 1
```{r}
# Define variables for the table
vars <- c("strk_event", "dth_event", "AGE", "SYSBP", "TOTCHOL", "BMI", "DIABETES", "PREVCHD", "BPMEDS", "CURSMOKE")
factorVars <- c("strk_event", "dth_event", "DIABETES", "PREVCHD", "BPMEDS", "CURSMOKE")

# Create the summary stratified by Sex
tab1_obj <- CreateTableOne(vars = vars, 
                           strata = "SEX", 
                           data = fram_10yr, 
                           factorVars = factorVars,
                           test = TRUE,
                           addOverall = TRUE)

# Generate table 1 using flextable
tab1_df <- print(tab1_obj, 
                 missing = TRUE,
                 #quote = FALSE, 
                 noSpaces = TRUE, 
                 printToggle = FALSE,
                 showAllLevels = FALSE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Characteristic") %>%
  select(-c(test))

# Rename rows and columns of table 1
tab1_df$Characteristic <- c("N", "Stroke event, n(%)", "Death, n(%)",
                            "Age, mean(SD)", "Systolic blood pressure, mean(SD)",
                            "Total cholesterol, mean(SD)", "BMI, mean(SD)", 
                            "Diabetic, n(%)","Prevalent coronary heart disease, n(%)",
                            "Use of anti-hypertensive meds, n(%)", "Smoking, n(%)")
colnames(tab1_df) <- c("Characteristic", "Overall", 
                      "Men", "Women", "p-value",
                      "Rate of Missing (%)")

ft1 <- flextable(tab1_df) %>%
  set_header_labels(Characteristic = "Baseline Characteristic") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(j = 1:6, align = "center", part = "body") %>%
  #italic(i = ~ str_detect(Characteristic, "mean|%"), j = 1) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  add_footer_lines("Note: Stroke event indicates participants had the first occurrence of stroke within the 10-year follow-up; Censoring in stroke event includes death without stroke and completion of 10-year follow-up; Death indicates participants die within the 10-year follow-up.") %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  set_caption("Table 1. Descriptive statistics of baseline characteristics, the number of stroke and death event by sex")

# Display table
ft1
```

# Kaplan-Meier Curves
```{r}
# Fit KM Curve for Secondary risk factors
km_chd <- survfit(Surv(fotime, strk_event) ~ PREVCHD, data = fram_10yr)
km_bpmeds <- survfit(Surv(fotime, strk_event) ~ BPMEDS, data = fram_10yr)
km_smoke <- survfit(Surv(fotime, strk_event) ~ CURSMOKE, data = fram_10yr)

# Generate individual plots
plot_chd <- ggsurvplot(km_chd, data = fram_10yr, break.time.by = 365,
                       xlim = c(0, 3652.5), ylim = c(0.8, 1), 
                       title = "Prevalent CHD", font.title = c(12),
                       legend.labs = c("No", "Yes"), 
                       xlab = "Days of Follow-up", 
                       ylab = "Stroke-Free Survival Probability",
                       ggtheme = theme_minimal())

plot_bpmeds <- ggsurvplot(km_bpmeds, data = fram_10yr, break.time.by = 365,
                          xlim = c(0, 3652.5), ylim = c(0.8, 1),
                          title = "Use of Anti-hypertensive Meds", font.title = c(12),
                          xlab = "Days of Follow-up",
                          ylab = "Stroke-Free Survival Probability",
                          legend.labs = c("No", "Yes"), ggtheme = theme_minimal())

plot_smoke <- ggsurvplot(km_smoke, data = fram_10yr, break.time.by = 365,
                         xlim = c(0, 3652.5), ylim = c(0.8, 1),
                         title = "Current Smoking", font.title = c(12),
                         xlab = "Days of Follow-up",
                         ylab = "Stroke-Free Survival Probability",
                         legend.labs = c("Non-Smoker", "Smoker"), ggtheme = theme_minimal())

# Arrange in two columns
splots <- list(plot_chd, plot_bpmeds, plot_smoke)
arrange_ggsurvplots(splots, print = TRUE, ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                    title = "Figure 1. 10-Year Stroke-Free Kaplan-Meier Survival Curves by Secondary Risk Factors",
                    font.main = c(18, "bold"))
```

\pagebreak

## Code Appendix

```{r ref.label=knitr::all_labels(appendix == TRUE), echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE, include=TRUE}
```
